nasb.text: who has kept with Your servant David, my father, that which You have promised him; indeed You have spoken with Your mouth and have fulfilled it with Your hand, as it is this day.

esv.text: who have kept with your servant David my father what you declared to him. You spoke with your mouth, and with your hand have fulfilled it this day.

cnv.text: 你對你的僕人我父親大衛所應許的，你都遵守了，你親口應許，也親手成全，就像今日一樣。

ccb.text: 你持守给你仆人——我父大卫的应许，你曾亲口应许，你今天亲手成就了。
